# Emerging Web Solutions

Premium web development agency serving clients worldwide. We specialize in high-performance, SEO-ready WordPress websites for small and medium businesses.

## Core Value Proposition
- **Website First, Pay Next**: We build your complete website demo first; you only pay if you are 100% satisfied.
- **Global Pricing**: ₹14,999 INR (Local India) / $199 USD + Taxes (Worldwide).
- **All-Inclusive Packages**: Domain, Premium Hosting, SSL, and Professional Design are included for the first year.

## Services
- **Custom Web Design**: 10+ pages, mobile-responsive, unique branding.
- **E-Commerce Solutions**: WooCommerce setup, product management, secure payments.
- **Business Systems**: Integrated appointment booking and custom admin dashboards.
- **SEO & Performance**: Built-in Google Search Console, Analytics, and Speed Optimization.

## Pricing & Packages
- **Essential Package (₹9,999 / $149)**: Basic professional site, all-inclusive for 1 year.
- **Starter Growth Package (₹14,999 / $199)**: Includes Advanced Business Management and Appointment Booking Systems.

## Partnership & Affiliate
- **10% Flat Commission**: Earn for every successful referral worldwide.
- **No Threshold Payouts**: Direct to Bank or UPI.
